**STOP: DO NOT REPORT SECURITY VULNERABILITIES HERE**

Please read our [Security Policy](../../SECURITY.md) before reporting a vulnerability.

Publicly disclosing a security vulnerability here will put Kairo users at risk. Please email all security reports directly to: **security@example.com**

If this is NOT a vulnerability but rather a security enhancement suggestion, you may proceed.

**Describe the security enhancement**
A clear and concise description of the security improvement you are suggesting.
